examples: There are fish and snails that eat starfish, particularly the giant triton snail, which is the main predator of the starfish.
Astronomers know that Pluto and Triton have nearly the same size, mass, and density.
Other moons affected by tidal forces are Enceladus (Saturn) and Triton (Neptune).
Ford is marketing its Triton truck engine, and Cadillac is touting its powerful Northstar engine.
It helps that the Ceiba field, unlike the one in Colombia, belongs almost entirely to Triton.
